title: Instrument sync, validation, and pack runtime
summary: Add nested telemetry around sync harness execution, validation entrypoints, and pack runtime import and resolution.
scope_items: Instrument sync harness aggregate and per-target execution.
Instrument validation suite and contract evaluation entrypoints.
Instrument pack integration import and runtime resolution paths.
done_when_items: Sync, validation, and pack runtime paths emit nested telemetry events with outcome context.
Regression tests cover import failures and target execution telemetry.
